context: S2-ANAM-VERIFY verified the death ratio formula was correct and fixed: (1) double total_runs increment, (2) added fins_vues counter to meta. It did NOT implement anam_accumulated because BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX is blocked on director q-20260414-001. Checks CHK-1/2/5 are FAIL_PENDING pending director decision.

checks.description: run.anam_accumulated incremented by _apply_add_anam(), NOT writing to meta.anam during run
checks.evidence: _apply_add_anam() at engine:433-444 writes to BOTH run['anam'] (line 438) AND meta['anam'] (line 442) immediately. No anam_accumulated field exists. BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX (P10) is blocked on director q-20260414-001.

checks.description: calculate_run_rewards() includes run.anam_accumulated in pool before death ratio
checks.evidence: calculate_run_rewards() (store_run:331-376) starts from ANAM_BASE_REWARD + bonuses only. No reference to run.anam_accumulated or run.anam. The run.anam field written by _apply_add_anam() is never consumed by the rewards pipeline.
checks.additional_note: run['anam'] is initialized in init_run():16 and written by _apply_add_anam():438, but is never read by calculate_run_rewards() or apply_run_rewards(). This field is vestigial in the current architecture — either it should be removed or it should feed into rewards when q-20260414-001 is resolved.

checks.description: Death ratio formula: min(cards_played/30, 1.0) is correct
checks.evidence: store_run.gd:351-354: death_cap=ANAM_REWARDS['death_cap_cards']=30, ratio=minf(float(cards_played)/float(death_cap), 1.0), anam=int(float(anam)*ratio). Formula matches bible s.5.1 exactly.

checks.description: apply_run_rewards() credits scaled anam total to meta.anam
checks.evidence: store_run.gd:382: meta['anam'] = int(meta.get('anam',0)) + anam_earned. Single source of truth. stats.total_anam_earned also updated at line 385.
init_run() (store_run:12-50) sets run['anam']=0 (line 16) but no anam_accumulated field. Field doesn't exist anywhere in codebase. Blocked on q-20260414-001.

checks.description: Double total_runs increment fixed: single source of truth in apply_run_rewards()
checks.evidence: handle_run_end() (store_run:287-305) increments ONLY meta['fins_vues'] (line 290). meta['total_runs'] is incremented ONLY in apply_run_rewards() (line 383). No double-increment. S2-ANAM-VERIFY fix confirmed.

checks.description: fins_vues counter properly initialized in default profile and incremented on run end
checks.evidence: merlin_save_system.gd:22: 'fins_vues': 0 in _get_default_profile(). store_run.gd:290: meta['fins_vues'] = int(meta.get('fins_vues',0)) + 1 in handle_run_end(). S2-ANAM-VERIFY fix confirmed. Needed by S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL (collines_dolmens arc: fins_vues >= 5).

checks.description: Director q-20260414-001 decision applied (whichever option chosen)
checks.evidence: q-20260414-001 status is still 'pending' in feedback_questions.json. BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX (P10) explicitly states 'Wait for director answer on q-20260414-001 before implementing'. No implementation should proceed until director responds.

CHK-4 PASS: apply_run_rewards credit path stable
CHK-6 PASS: double total_runs bug NOT reproduced — fix confirmed

observations: run['anam'] (initialized in init_run, written by _apply_add_anam) is NEVER read by the rewards pipeline. It's a vestigial field. Should be removed OR promoted to anam_accumulated when q-20260414-001 is resolved.

calculate_maturity_score() uses meta.get('endings_seen',[]).size() for the 'fins_vues' maturity weight (not meta.fins_vues). Both values should correlate (same increment condition) but they're not the same counter.
BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX (P10) remains blocked. Once director answers q-20260414-001, re-run this test.
patterns_confirmed: PAT-043: Anam formula verified correct (death ratio formula at store_run:352-354)
PAT-044: fins_vues counter operational (save_system default + handle_run_end increment)

new_pattern.pattern: run['anam'] is initialized and written by ADD_ANAM effects but is NOT consumed by calculate_run_rewards(). When a field is written but never read in the rewards pipeline, it is architecturally dead weight — either remove it or wire it in. Check for write-only fields whenever a director decision changes reward architecture.

blocking_question: q-20260414-001 — Must be answered before BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX can proceed
